title: Milks Horror Survival
description: This Modpack Has Horror Aspects in it from other creators. That Should Make it scary And Challenging
body: This Mod Pack Encludes Horror Mods, Such As. Essentials.Descent into madness. The Cave Dweller. The One Who Watches. The Man From The Fog. The End Of HeroBrine From The Fog. New Weapons. Bad Dreams. Shaders. New Villager Aspects. New Biomes. True Darkness. The Graveyard And Much More. I Made This Mod For People To Play With Their Friends Or By Yourself. If Somthing in the mod doesn't work then text me on discord, My Discord Is MilkyWilky9166. Please Note. I created None of these mods there all from different people. Also this is my first mod so don't expect it to be the best.
